name: Spirit Converter
name_jp: スピリット<ruby lang="jp"><rb>変</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>換</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>置</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn: You can target 1 Xyz Monster you control; attach 1 Level 4 LIGHT monster you control to that Xyz Monster. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: Target 2 Level 4 LIGHT Thunder monsters with the same name in your GY; add those targets to your hand.
eff: Once per turn: You can target 1 Xyz Monster you control; attach 1 Level 4 LIGHT monster you control to that Xyz Monster. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: Target 2 Level 4 LIGHT Thunder monsters with the same name in your GY; add those targets to your hand.

action: Attaches from your field as Xyz Material
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
